hooks.command: input=$(cat); echo "$input" | jq -e ".stop_hook_active == true" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; out=$(npm --prefix /Users/billy/WORK/Bizkit run typecheck 2>&1); test $? -eq 0 && exit 0; printf "%s" "$out" | jq -Rs "{decision:\"block\",reason:(\"Typecheck failed before finishing the turn. Fix these — do not claim success:\n\"+.)}"
